allow: Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); import main; print\('Import OK'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/chat/stream -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message": "What is the average rating in the dataset?", "model_id": "nemotron", "prompt_id": "concise"}' --max-time 60)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Uploaded:', d['uploaded'][0]['filename'], d['uploaded'][0]['row_count'], 'rows'\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/chat/stream -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message": "What is the average discounted_price in the dataset? Compute it precisely.", "model_id": "nemotron", "prompt_id": "concise"}' --max-time 120)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\('-', s\) for s in d['suggestions'][:3]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Files after restart:', len\(d\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Files after fresh start:', len\(d\)\)")
